blended.narrative: Ski Granby Ranch is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 7.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 20" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
